zh.Of, Saloniki, Macedonia, Greece: 希臘斯普洛亞薩洛尼吉
zh.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire於1068年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，她的父親Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II32歲，母親Maria of Bulgaria15歲。她於1088年與Gen. Georgios Palaiologos在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1110年享年42歲。

zh-hans.Of, Saloniki, Macedonia, Greece: 希腊斯普洛亞薩洛尼吉
zh-hans.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire于1068年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II32岁，母亲Maria of Bulgaria15岁。她于1088年与Gen. Georgios Palaiologos在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1110年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Empire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Impey   or   Empey  .

variants.name: Impey
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English imphage, imphey ‘hedge or enclosure made of saplings’ (Old English imphaga, imphæg), or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word, e.g. Impey Hall (Buttsbury, Essex) and Imphaugh Farm (Stonham Aspal, Suffolk). Compare Empey and Empie .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire was born in 1068, in İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, was 32 and her mother, Maria of Bulgaria, was 15. She married Gen. Georgios Palaiologos in 1088, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1110, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire est née en 1068, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maria of Bulgaria, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Gen. Georgios Palaiologos en 1088, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1110, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire 1068 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II 32 und ihre Mutter Maria of Bulgaria 15. Sie hat 1088 in İstanbul, Türkei Gen. Georgios Palaiologos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1110 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire è nata il nel 1068 nel İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maria of Bulgaria, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Gen. Georgios Palaiologos nel 1088, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1110, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Of, Saloniki, Macedonia, Greece: ギリシャスエスプロティアサロンiキ
ja.Constantinople,Istanbul,Turkey: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empireが1068年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire IIは32歳，母Maria of Bulgariaは15歳であった。1088年にトルコイスタンブルでGen. Georgios Palaiologosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1110年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire(이)가 1068년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria of Bulgaria(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1088년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Gen. Georgios Palaiologos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1110년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire nasceu em 1068, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maria of Bulgaria, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Gen. Georgios Palaiologos em 1088, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1110, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire родилась в 1068 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maria of Bulgaria, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gen. Georgios Palaiologos в 1088 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1110 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Dukaina Princess Byzantine Empire nació en 1068, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Maria of Bulgaria, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Gen. Georgios Palaiologos en 1088, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1110, a la edad de 42 años.
